title: juncus arcticus subsp. littoralis
intro: Juncus arcticus subsp. littoralis, also known as littoral rush, is a subspecies of the Arctic rush plant, which is a perennial plant belonging to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Juncus arcticus subsp. littoralis include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to make salves and ointments for skin irritations.
